prose:
Method–provenance block
Property: Frontier-orbital energies (HOMO, LUMO) and HOMO–LUMO gap (eV)
Level of theory: DFT, tier `standard` → B3LYP/def2-TZVP with RI (density fitting) in PySCF
Geometry provenance: user-supplied Cartesian coordinates from /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz; single-point calculation (no further optimisation) → notation: DFT//input-xyz
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit or explicit solvation)
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell singlet)
Software/backend: PySCF (version not reported by engine)
Convergence & caveats: SCF converged in 9 cycles; no warnings reported by engine (`warnings` array empty). No fall-backs triggered. Density-fitting approximation active by default.
Live log file: the SCF/DFT run streamed to a frontier-orbitals .out logfile in the calling directory during execution (path printed by the engine when the job launched).

Headline numerical result (HOMO–LUMO gap)
  5.3048177 eV

Selected orbital energies (eV)
  HOMO  (index 24):  −5.553772
  LUMO  (index 25):  −0.2489544
  Gap (HOMO→LUMO):  5.3048177

Additional Koopmans-derived quantities
  Vertical ionisation potential (IP): 5.553772 eV
  Vertical electron affinity (EA):    0.2489544 eV
  Electronegativity χ:                2.9013632 eV
  Chemical hardness η:               2.6524088 eV
  Electrophilicity ω:                1.5868422 eV

Reproducibility
CLI invocation (from result JSON):
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpsupw7zex/live.json
The result JSON (including full orbital table) is saved at the path above. Geometry and all generated cube/molden files are in the same scratch directory.

All fields required by chemkit calculation-reporting standards have been provided. The computation is marked integrity.trustworthy = true.
